mapper.sql: id, datasource_code, datasource_name, datasource_type, jdbc_url, username, password_cipher, status, last_check_time, owner_user_id, remark, created_time, updated_time, creator_id, updater_id, deleted
mapper.update:
UPDATE ea_archive_datasource
datasource_name = #{datasourceName}, datasource_type = #{datasourceType}, jdbc_url = #{jdbcUrl}, username = #{username}, password_cipher = #{passwordCipher}, status = #{status}, last_check_time = #{lastCheckTime}, owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, remark = #{remark}, updater_id = #{updaterId}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ea_archive_datasource SET deleted = 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ea_archive_datasource WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM ea_archive_datasource d WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ea_archive_connection_permission p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.datasource_id = d.id )
SELECT FROM ea_archive_datasource WHERE datasource_code = #{datasourceCode} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM ea_archive_datasource
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT FROM ea_archive_datasource d
AND d.status = #{status}
AND d.deleted = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ea_archive_connection_permission p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.datasource_id = d.id )
ORDER BY d.id DESC

SELECT FROM ea_archive_datasource
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}
SELECT status, COUNT(1) AS count FROM ea_archive_datasource WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_archive_datasource
AND status = #{status}
AND (datasource_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR datasource_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND deleted = 0
